description: A solid right-angle triangular prism on the XY plane with its right angle at the origin, featuring a 20mm leg along X and a 30mm leg along Y, extruded 40mm in the +Z direction.
notes: To model this, create a 2D sketch on the XY plane defining a right-angle triangle with vertices at (0,0,0), (20,0,0), and (0,30,0). Extrude this sketch 40mm along the positive Z-axis. Ensure the orientation and origin alignment match the prompt exactly.
